name: CPG Morning Brief — Revenue

data.dsp_query: SELECT date_trunc('day', order_date) AS d, region, SUM(amount) AS rev FROM public.sales WHERE order_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 50

semantic.cypher: MATCH (o:DspObject)-[:DOMAIN_OF]->(d:Domain {name: 'Sales'}) RETURN o.id AS id, d.name AS domain LIMIT 20

external.searxng_query: {{ user_state.get('topics_of_interest', ['cpg revenue'])[0] if user_state else 'cpg revenue' }} news
